name: Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Bring the garlic and water to a boil. Simmer for 5 to 10 minutes. Turn off the heat and whisk in Butter Buds. Pour or spoon the garlic stock over the sliced bread. If desired, distribute the tomato and herbs over the bread. Wrap the bread in foil and bake for about ten minutes. Open the foil and broil for about one minute more until the desired warmth or crispness.
